title: StudioDash Revenue Analytics
description: Track App Store, advertising, and website revenue in one place with StudioDash Revenue Analytics.
summary: StudioDash helps you understand where your revenue comes from, how it changes over time, and which products or providers are driving your business.

featureShowcases.heading: Understand Your Revenue
featureShowcases.summary: See how every connected provider contributes to your overall revenue.
featureShowcases.body: StudioDash brings together revenue from App Store Connect, advertising, and website monetisation into a single view. Compare providers, identify trends, and quickly understand where changes are happening without switching between multiple dashboards.
bullets: View revenue by provider, app, country, and date.
Compare historical performance across reporting periods.
Clearly distinguish between live data, unavailable providers, and planned integrations.

image.alt: StudioDash revenue analytics showing provider totals and trends
image.caption: Understand where your revenue comes from and how it changes over time.

sections.heading: A Complete Revenue Overview
paragraphs: StudioDash brings together revenue from your connected developer services, helping you understand the financial performance of your apps, games, and websites from one dashboard.
Historical comparisons, provider breakdowns, and trend analysis help you quickly identify where revenue is growing, declining, or remaining stable.

sections.heading: Supported Revenue Sources
paragraphs: Revenue information depends on the providers you've connected and the data each service makes available.
bullets: App Store Connect – Sales, downloads, and revenue reporting.
AdSense – Website monetisation insights as support becomes available.
Provider status clearly explains when data is unavailable or still being configured.

sections.heading: Understand Revenue Trends
paragraphs: Historical reporting helps you compare different time periods, identify seasonal patterns, and measure the impact of product releases, marketing campaigns, or updates.
Future releases of StudioDash are planned to introduce richer reporting, exports, forecasting, and additional financial insights.
